productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Lucent Multi White Shoe
description: Style NoteThis pair of kicks from adidas exudes serious downtown cool. Without the typical low ankle cut (as in most casual shoes) this pair features an ankle-high collar, a design detail we just love. Style this with a monochrome tee and a pair of denims to balance your look. Product DetailsWhite printed synthetic upper on a round toed shoeOrange inner with mesh paddingCentral lace-ups and a padded tongueEVA midsoleTPU outsole with grooves all over and a pivot point at the big toe mound regionMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
